title: Simple Flowered Moss
description: Adds random azalea flowers to some moss blocks to make it look better! No OptiFine required!
body:
Simple Flowered Moss is a resource pack that adds little random flowers to moss, having a 50% chance of replacing a normal moss block.\
This does not require OptiFine like some variated block textures do, it is completely vanilla (although it does still have perfect compatibility with mods)!\
There are 32 different variations of flowered moss (8 regular textures with 4 different rotations, and 1 normal moss with 4 different rotations, so 36 in total) so that it does not feel too boring!\
![Simple Flowered Moss](https://i.postimg.cc/wjNgj1pG/2025-02-02-13-14-46.png)\
Enjoy!
